untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of bearish divergence (successive peaks with smaller advances over increasing time intervals), which is a complex pattern recognition task not expressible through the allowed indicators and operators. RSI_14 extreme high levels (>70) are used as a proxy for momentum extremes, but the core divergence pattern detection cannot be accurately translated into the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using RSI_14 > 70 to represent momentum at extreme high level, with RSI_14 > 50 to approximate 'well above midpoint'. Exit condition uses RSI_14 < 50 as mean reversion trigger. However, the actual bearish divergence pattern (each successive peak smaller, occurring after more time) requires multi-bar historical comparison and pattern detection unavailable in the allowed indicators.
